arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale makes Mikel Arteta feelings clear with honest Arsenal title claim
arts.sum: Aaron Ramsdale ended his Arsenal torment in the summer transfer window by signing for newly-promoted Southampton, and the goalkeeper's reason for the move was crystal clear

arts.ttl: Ramsdale's CLASSY message to Arsenal and Raya
arts.sum: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Aaron Ramsdale has heaped praise on David Raya ahead of his return to the Emirates Stadium this weekend. I do think it put pressure on David [Raya] at times as well.

If you would like to receive Fabrizio Romano’s exclusive articles via email ahead of publication on caughtoffside.com, please sign-up for the service here: thedailybriefing.io — Ben Chilwell will move in January but Josh Acheampong is staying at Chelsea Photo by Mike Hewitt/Getty Images It’s […] The post Transfer news: One stays and one goes at Chelsea, Partey to remain at Arsenal and more appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Southampton boss Russell Martin: 'We're being written off after six games and I don't like it'
arts.sum: WALLY MEETS: The odds are stacked against Russell Martin and Southampton staying up - but the Saints boss does not appreciate the vultures circling so soon, even if their next fixture looks daunting

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool suffer fatal transfer blow as six-year contract 'agreed'
arts.sum: Newcastle United's Anthony Gordon reportedly agrees a new six-year contract with the Magpies, ending speculation over his future amid interest from Arsenal and Liverpool.

CB: Gabriel - The Brazilian defender remains one of Arsenal's biggest goal threats from set-pieces and will get a chance or two against a Saints side that has conceded 12 goals in six league games. Arsenal will aim to keep pace with the Premier League's title hopefuls in their final game before the October international break against Southampton.

arts.ttl: Southampton boss Russell Martin explains what his side must do against Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal scored a league-high 20 goals from set-pieces last season and are joint-top again this term with three in six games. Russell Martin insists Southampton have plenty to be “excited and positive about” ahead of their Premier League clash with Arsenal at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Ray Parlour predicts result of Arsenal v Southampton clash tomorrow, says £65m player will score
arts.sum: Arsenal will look to continue on their great run of form when they host Premier League strugglers Southampton on Saturday. The Gunners remain unbeaten this...
